creator: yehorov@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Aug 27, 2012 at 2:34 PM, Mark Felder <feld@feld.me> wrote:
> Was this Citrix XenServer 5.x? I've successfully done installs from a real
> CD and an ISO on XenServer 6.x.

Yes. I'm unable to install FreeBSD 9.0 from an ISO image on Citrix
XenServer 5.0.0.
And I also successfully installed FreeBSD 9.0 on Citrix XenServer 6.0.
